message:
fix: extend health cache TTL for auth-failed clusters to prevent log flooding (#3158) (#3167)

Clusters with expired exec credential plugins (e.g. Teleport tsh) were
re-probed every 60s, triggering the plugin each time and flooding stderr
with "tsh login" errors. Auth-failed clusters now cache for 10 minutes
instead of 60 seconds, with clear log messages directing users to refresh
their credentials.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
